prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约3103→4041→8552→5220→8634名，整体呈大幅后移趋势。2023年骤降至8552名，2024年短暂回升至5220名，2025年再度后移至8634名，近两年波动剧烈，整体竞争格局趋于宽松；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为23人，2024年略减至21人，2025年大幅扩至31人，2026年计划33人，较2025年再增2人，连续两年扩招，竞争压力持续缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定，属全国政法类最高学府；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），但抖音综合热度排名第6（高热），短视频曝光量高，整体关注度不减；2024年曾出现内蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌信号，但江西理科未见明显断档记录；法学为A+学科（全国唯一），是该校核心王牌；理科招生专业如经济学、工商管理、金融工程等虽非法学主体，但依托法学优势形成交叉培养特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度2024年评估为"分化观望"，但法大法学品牌效应依然强劲；江西省2026年高考总报名约474900人，按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算约26.8万人，较2025年（266425人）略增约1400人；省控线2025年物理类本科批429分、特殊类型505分，较2024年（448/520）有所下降，反映试卷难度或整体竞争格局变化；中国政法大学位于北京，属跨省招生；该校在江西省理科招生占比约2%–3%，无本省倾斜，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8634名、2026年计划继续小幅扩招（+2人）使竞争进一步缓解，但物理类考生略增形成轻微对冲。在供需弹性主值基础上，结合位次后移趋势延续、省控线下降等信号，预计位次较2025年继续后移约384名；预测最低位次约9018名，区间8518–9518名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3103 → 4041 → 8552 → 5220 → 8634, showing a significant overall backward trend. In 2023, it sharply dropped to 8552, briefly rebounded to 5220 in 2024, and then fell again to 8634 in 2025, with severe fluctuations in recent years and an overall loosening competitive landscape. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Jiangxi Province: 23 students each year from 2021 to 2023, slightly reduced to 21 in 2024, significantly expanded to 31 in 2025, and planned 33 for 2026, an increase of 2 compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, continuously easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, and is the highest institution of political science and law in China. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but its overall Douyin popularity ranks 6th (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining overall attention. In 2024, there was a signal of a sharp drop in the admission score line for law in Inner Mongolia science category, but no obvious gap was recorded in Jiangxi science category. Law is an A+ discipline (the only one in the country) and is the university's core strength. Although science enrollment majors such as Economics, Business Administration, and Financial Engineering are not the main body of law, they leverage the advantage of law to form interdisciplinary training characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of law in 2024 is assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see', but the brand effect of CUPL's law remains strong. The total number of Jiangxi Province 2026 college entrance examination registrants is approximately 474,900, with an estimated 268,000 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 56.4%, a slight increase of about 1,400 compared to 2025 (266,425). The provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 429 points, and the special type is 505 points, a decrease from 2024 (448/520), reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall competitive landscape. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi science category is about 2%–3%, with no local preference, and regional preference is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8634 and the continued slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+2 students), competition further eases, but the slight increase in physics category candidates creates a minor offset. On the basis of the main supply-demand elasticity value, combined with signals such as the continuation of the backward ranking trend and the decline in the provincial control line, it is expected that the ranking will continue to move back by about 384 places compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9018, with a range of 8518–9518.

- International Business (Foreign-related Legal Business Talent Training Experimental Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8518–9518, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 law and interdisciplinary training programs as the main choices, with Tier 1 law experimental classes as a reach, and Tier 3 Financial Engineering and Economics as safety options. CUPL's law A+ discipline advantage is prominent, and science candidates can obtain a law background through dual degrees, joint training, and other pathways.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 892 → 691 → 371 → 655 → 517, showing overall significant fluctuations. In 2023, it surged to 371 (best in recent years), dropped to 655 in 2024, and rebounded to 517 in 2025, with a slight upward trend in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 517. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province's liberal arts/history category: 27 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 32 in 2024, significantly expanded to 44 in 2025, and planned 47 in 2026, an increase of 3 compared to 2025. With three consecutive years of expansion, competition pressure has somewhat eased.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50–56 range in recent years, and is the highest institution of political science and law in China. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), but Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 6th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting rising application attention. In 2024, there was a signal of a sharp drop in the admission score line for science law majors in Inner Mongolia, but no obvious gaps were recorded for liberal arts/history categories. Law is an A+ discipline (the only one nationwide) and is the core strength of the university. Related disciplines such as sociology and political science also have strong capabilities, making it particularly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the law major was assessed as 'recommended' in 2023 and turned to 'divergent observation' in 2024, but it remains a popular direction overall. In 2026, the total number of Jiangxi Province college entrance examination registrants is approximately 474,900, with an estimated 207,000 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 43.6%, roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line for the 2025 history category undergraduate batch is 486 points, and special type is 539 points, an increase from 2024 (463/532), reflecting slightly intensified overall competition. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, involving cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 2.5%–3.5% (approximately 44 students in 2025 out of the national total plan), with no provincial bias, and regional preference is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 517 and the continued slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3 students) easing competition, but offset by factors such as high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention and rising provincial control lines. On the basis of the main value of supply-demand elasticity, combined with signals such as stable candidate numbers and divergent law popularity, it is expected that the ranking will slightly decline by about 31 positions compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 548, with a range of 448–648.
